subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-09
subcodes.first_line: The Gospel expressly records that in His first coming, although Christ was born to Mary, He Himself said that He came from heaven. Thus, the meaning of 'heaven' is the greatness of the Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: بصریح انجیل در ظهور اول هم با انکه آن حضرت از مریم متولد شده بود
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @symbolism, @power of the Manifestation of God, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary
